zh.Whissendine, Rutland, England: 英國英格蘭盧特藍德森丁
zh.Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, United: 英國蘇格蘭培爾阿波內
zh.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway是de Galloway的女兒，於1185年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾培斯。她於大約1215年與Laurence Abernethy在蘇格蘭培爾阿波內結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1241年12月18日在英國英格蘭盧特藍德森丁享年56歲。

zh-hans.Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland, United: 英国苏格兰培爾阿波內
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway是de Galloway的女儿，于1185年出生在英国苏格兰培爾培斯。她于大约1215年与Laurence Abernethy在苏格兰培爾阿波內结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1241年12月18日在英国英格兰盧特藍德森丁享年56岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Galloway
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from Galloway in southwest Scotland, named as ‘place of the foreign Gaels’, from Gaelic gall ‘foreigner’ + Gaidheal ‘Gael’. From the 8th century or before it was a province of Anglian Northumbria. In the 9th century it was settled by mixed Gaelic-Norse inhabitants from the Hebrides and Isle of Man.

variants.name: Gallaway
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Galloway  .

variants.name: Galway
meanings: Irish and Scottish: in most cases, probably a variant of Scottish   Galloway  , rather than from the city or county in Connacht (habitational names are rare in Ireland). During the Middle Ages Galways were wealthy merchants on the south coast of Ireland, but now the name there is largely confined to Ulster.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
meanings: Hebrew: Bitter; Marion is the French form.

variants.name: Marion
meanings: Originally a medieval French diminutive form of Marie , introduced to Britain in the Middle Ages. In some places it was taken as a pet form of Margaret or Margery . As a male name, it is an altered form of the Continental male name Marian, a derivative of Latin Marianus (from Marius ), but is now rarely, if ever, used. It was the birth name of the American film star John Wayne ( 1907–79 ).

variants.name: Marcia
meanings: Often used as a feminine equivalent of Mark , but in fact a feminine form of Marcius, itself a derivative of Marcus . One St Marcia is commemorated in a group with Felix, Luciolus, Fortunatus, and others; another with Zenais, Cyria, and Valeria; and a third with Ariston, Crescentian, Eutychian, Urban, Vitalis, Justus, Felicissimus, Felix, and Symphorosa. None is individually very famous.

nameMeanings.name: Devorguilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway was born in 1185, in Perth, Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of de Galloway. She married Laurence Abernethy about 1215, in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 18 December 1241, in Whissendine, Rutland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway est née en 1185, à Perth, Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de de Galloway. Elle a épousé Laurence Abernethy environ 1215, à Abernethy, Perthshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 18 décembre 1241, à Whissendine, Rutland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway wurde 1185 in Perth, Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von de Galloway geboren. Sie hat um 1215 in Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland Laurence Abernethy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 18. Dezember 1241 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Whissendine, Rutland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway è nata il nel 1185 nel Perth, Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di de Galloway. Lei sposato Laurence Abernethy circa 1215, nel Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 18 dicembre 1241, nel Whissendine, Rutland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Gallowayは1185年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアペルスでde Gallowayの娘として生まれた。約1215年にスコットランドペルスシュアイアアバーネシーでLaurence Abernethyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1241年12月18日にイギリスイギリスルトランドウィセンディンで56歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway(은)는 1185년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르 퍼스에서 de Galloway의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 대략 1215년 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 압어네시에서 Laurence Abernethy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1241년 12월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 루틀랜드 위센딘에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway nasceu em 1185, em Perth, Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de de Galloway. Ela casou-se com Laurence Abernethy aproximadamente 1215, em Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 18 de dezembro de 1241, em Whissendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 56 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway родилась в 1185 г. в местности пирт, пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её отца звали de Galloway. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Laurence Abernethy около 1215 г. в местности абирнети, пиртшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 18 декабря 1241 г. в местности уиссенден, рутланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Devorguilla de Galloway nació en 1185, en Perth, Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de de Galloway. Se casó con Laurence Abernethy aproximadamente 1215, en Abernethy, Perthshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 18 de diciembre de 1241, en Whissendine, Rutland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 56 años.
